visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman dressed in a large, circular green lime slice costume dances enthusiastically under a concrete highway bridge. She wears a small green leaf-shaped hat and neutral-colored pants. The setting is a paved public square with pillars painted with sky and rainbow murals. (2) The woman falls dramatically onto the tiled ground, her hands splayed out. Large comic-style impact lines and variety text appear on screen to emphasize the fall. (3) A person in a giant transparent plastic coffee cup costume, complete with a red straw, appears in a stylized 'heroic' close-up. The camera zooms in on their face visible through the cup's side. (4) The lime-dressed woman and the coffee-cup character reach toward each other in a romantic parody. Heart emojis and soft focus filters are applied to the frame. (5) Transition to a modern kitchen with green ambient lighting. The woman, now in casual black attire, holds a shaker cup and drinks coffee. (6) Detailed product shots of NESCAFÉ boxes and sachets on a wooden table. A hand pours coffee powder into a glass, followed by water and ice cubes. (7) The woman, back in the lime costume, stands in the kitchen holding the coffee products, smiling and gesturing toward the camera. (8) A final outdoor shot shows the woman in a long, green pod-like costume holding the coffee boxes, followed by a comedic shot of her walking away.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 是咖啡哥哥!!!! [Variety]: (Impact lines). (2) [Subtitle]: 檸檬姊姊跌倒了. (3) [Subtitle]: 姊姊我來了~~~. (4) [Subtitle]: 這就是我們愛的結晶. (5) [Slogan]: 雀巢香檸美式咖啡. (6) [Slogan]: 全球獨賣. (7) [Subtitle]: 使用台灣在地檸檬原料. (8) [Subtitle]: 完全零添加. (9) [Subtitle]: 新鮮檸檬摘採後. (10) [Subtitle]: 一週內立即鮮榨. (11) [Subtitle]: 留下最難保留的. (12) [Subtitle]: 檸檬皮清香. (13) [Slogan]: 夏日清爽推薦. (14) [Subtitle]: 可以使用常溫冷水沖泡. (15) [Subtitle]: 隨時隨地. (16) [Subtitle]: 簡單沖泡就可以喝. (17) [Subtitle]: 非常方便. (18) [Subtitle]: 也可根據自己的口味. (19) [Subtitle]: 自由客製化調配咖啡. (20) [Subtitle]: 加冰塊更清爽. (21) [Subtitle]: 順口又好喝!. (22) [Subtitle]: 我的黃金比例喝法. (23) [Subtitle]: 水跟冰塊比例 1:1. (24) [Logo]: NESCAFÉ. (25) [Subtitle]: 3包加下去. (26) [Subtitle]: 放入約180ml的水. (27) [Subtitle]: 再加入約18顆小冰塊. (28) [Subtitle]: 沖泡出最完美的味道. (29) [Subtitle]: 我是檸檬 (?). (30) [Subtitle]: 讚啦!!. (31) [Subtitle]: 你真的不是豌豆嗎?

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator in a lime costume, 1 secondary person in a coffee cup costume.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long dark hair tied back. She wears a giant green lime slice costume and later a green pod costume.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: An outdoor area under a large concrete highway bridge with muraled pillars and a tiled floor; an indoor kitchen with modern appliances, wooden countertops, and green LED accent lighting.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-tempo electronic BGM starts immediately. A male voice narrates with a high-pitched, excited tone. A 'whoosh' SFX accompanies the initial movement. (2) A 'thud' sound effect marks the woman's fall, followed by a stylized cartoon crying sound. (3) A bright 'ding' sound effect triggers as the coffee character appears. The male voice says 'Sister, I'm coming!' in an exaggerated heroic style. (4) A romantic harp glissando and swelling orchestral strings briefly overlay the BGM during the romantic gaze sequence. (5) Sound of a sachet tearing and a 'pop' bubble SFX. The female voice begins a professional yet energetic product narration. (6) Clear acoustic sounds of water pouring into a glass and ice cubes clinking together. The BGM remains upbeat. (7) A satisfying slurping sound followed by a sharp exhale 'Ah' and a 'sparkle' chime sound effect. (8) The male and female voices alternate quickly, concluding with a cheerful final chime and the BGM fading out on a major chord.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Narrative Parody -> Product Demonstration -> Benefits -> Recipe -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video uses a comedic parody narrative involving human-sized lime and coffee characters to grab attention before transitioning into an informative endorsement for NESCAFÉ Lime Americano, highlighting its convenience and local ingredients.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Clear product demonstration, showing of packaging, verbal endorsement of flavor and convenience, and 'link in bio' style calls to action.

high_inference.freeDescribe: High-energy short-form ad combining meme culture with traditional product review elements. The visual contrast between the bridge setting and the professional kitchen helps distinguish the 'skit' from the 'sales' portion.
